content.problemStatement:
Consider an array AAA consisting of NNN positive elements. The frequency array of AAA is the array BBB of size NNN such that Bi=B_i =Bi‚Äã= frequency of element AiA_iAi‚Äã in AAA.

For example, if A=[4,7,4,11,2,7,7]A = [4, 7, 4, 11, 2, 7, 7]A=[4,7,4,11,2,7,7], the frequency array B=[2,3,2,1,1,3,3]B = [2, 3, 2, 1, 1, 3, 3]B=[2,3,2,1,1,3,3].

You have lost the array AAA, but fortunately you have the array BBB.

Your task is to construct the **lexicographically smallest** array AAA such that:


1‚â§Ai‚â§1051\le A_i \le 10^51‚â§Ai‚Äã‚â§105;
The frequency array of AAA is equal to BBB.
If no such array AAA exists, print ‚àí1-1‚àí1.

Note: Array XXX is lexicographically smaller than array YYY, if Xi<YiX_i \lt Y_iXi‚Äã<Yi‚Äã, where iii is the first index where XXX and YYY differ.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN ‚Äî the size of the array.
The next line contains NNN space-separated integers - B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BNB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_NB1‚Äã,B2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,BN‚Äã, the frequency array.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line, NNN space separated integers - A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã, the **lexicographically smallest** array AAA. If no such array AAA exists, print ‚àí1-1‚àí1.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 10610^6106.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: The lexicographically smallest array AAA having the given frequency array BBB is A=[1,2,2,2,1]A = [1, 2, 2, 2, 1]A=[1,2,2,2,1]. The element A1A_1A1‚Äã and A5A_5A5‚Äã have frequency 222 while A2,A3,A_2, A_3,A2‚Äã,A3‚Äã, and A4A_4A4‚Äã have frequency 333.
Test case 222: The lexicographically smallest array AAA having the given frequency array BBB is A=[1,2,3,4,5]A = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]A=[1,2,3,4,5]. Each element in AAA has frequency 111.
Test case 333: The lexicographically smallest array AAA having the given frequency array BBB is A=[1,1,1,1,1]A = [1, 1, 1, 1, 1]A=[1,1,1,1,1]. Each element in AAA has frequency 555.
Test case 444: No possible array AAA exists having the given frequency array.
